start: (sudo service docker start || sudo systemctl start docker || true) && (sudo docker rm -f localstack-barka 2>/dev/null || true) && (sudo docker image inspect localstack/localstack:community-archive >/dev/null 2>&1 || sudo docker pull localstack/localstack:community-archive) && sudo docker run -d --name localstack-barka -p 127.0.0.1:4566:4566 -e SERVICES=s3 -e DEBUG=0 localstack/localstack:community-archive && ( i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 120 ]; do if curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4566/_localstack/health >/dev/null; then break; fi; i=$((i+1)); sleep 1; done; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4566/_localstack/health >/dev/null || exit 1 )
